name: python3-ipython-pygments-lexers
title: python3-ipython-pygments-lexers
summary: Pygments lexer for ipython code and console sessions
description:
Pygments lexer for ipython code and console sessions
This was previously part of IPython, but was moved out in IPython 9. This
provides syntax highlighting support for Python code including IPythonisms
such as %magic and !shell.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ipython-pygments-lexers because Pygments lexer for ipython code and console sessions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ipython-pygments-lexers as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ipython-pygments-lexers with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ipython-pygments-lexers --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
